info.name: Calories Tracker API — Full Test Suite v2
info.description: Full test suite for all 48+ endpoints. Requires server running on port 3005.

item.name: 00 — Setup
item.description: Creates a verified test user. Requires server on port 3005 with admin credentials admin@gmail.com/admin.

exec: pm.test('User already exists — will get ID via admin API', () => true);

item.name: 00.3 Get Test User ID via Admin (if already existed)
00.4 Force Verify Test User Email (admin only)

exec: pm.test('No exercises found — workout tests will be skipped', () => true);

item.name: 00.7 Set Health Profile (needed for BMI/TDEE tests)

exec: pm.test('400 for forbidden field role', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: 01.7 Login — Non-existent User (401 no info leak)

exec: pm.test('401 for invalid refresh token', () => pm.response.to.have.status(401));
// At 2500ml > 2000ml goal → notification should be created (check folder 10)
pm.test('400 for invalid muscleGroup enum', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
console.log('Weekly report time: ' + pm.response.responseTime + 'ms (was 7 sequential DB calls, now 1 batch)');
console.log('Monthly report time: ' + pm.response.responseTime + 'ms (was 30 sequential calls, now 1 batch)');
pm.test('Count is a number', () => pm.expect(typeof (pm.response.json().data ?? pm.response.json())).to.equal('number'));
pm.test('401 for wrong admin password', () => pm.response.to.have.status(401));

body.raw: {"title":"Test Blog Post","content":"This is test blog content for API testing purposes. Minimum length required."}

item.name: 11.17 SECURITY — Banned User Login → 403 (Bug H2 fix verified)

exec: pm.test('[Bug H2 fix] Banned user gets 403', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('[Bug H2 fix] Message mentions deactivated', () => pm.expect(JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('deactivated'));
